name: zitadel-idp
description: Zitadel self-hosted OIDC integration field guide — 37 documented quirks with proto-aligned examples verified against raw GitHub Zitadel v4.15.0. Captures the full set of high-friction issues discovered while integrating Zitadel v4.x as the IdP for JRC Brasil ERP — FirstInstance env placement, volume permissions, v1/v2 API split, tenant→orgId mapping, JWT validation traps over self-signed HTTPS (NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS, JWKS over HTTPS), loginV2 instance flag, silent-renew redirect URI byte-match, JWT access token sem profile claims, idempotent bootstrap 'No changes' 400, TLS-terminating reverse proxy, secure-context PKCE on LAN, boot-time signinSilent recursion, StrictMode + closure cancelled flag, post_logout_redirect_uri invalid, branding da Login UI v1 / privateLabelingSetting / 405 em /assets/v1, custom_login_text e LANG-lg4DP, F5 com InMemoryWebStorage, 401 storm pós --reset-zitadel por tsx-watch zumbi, regressão multi-app YAML que sobrescreve env vars OIDC_REDIRECT_URIS dinâmicas, Zitadel v2.66.x panic 'No master key provided' (fix com flag CLI '--masterkey'); v0.3.0 — full v2.66 → v4 upgrade runbook + API v1 → v2 Connect protocol mapping; v0.4.0 — proto-aligned payloads verificados contra raw GitHub v4.15.0 (CreateApplication discriminator é oidcConfiguration top-level com applicationType / developmentMode internos, NÃO oidc com appType / devMode); per-service ListResponse field names; CreateAuthorization shape; AlreadyExisting matcher; quirk 28 — Login UI v2 auto-provisioning quebrado em v4.15.0 (zitadel/zitadel#8910 / #9293, mitigação canônica é Path B do quirk 25 com loginV2.required: false). v0.6.0 — Console UI human-user creation pitfalls (3 new quirks: 33 — Add Human User auto-truncates Username to email local-part; 34 — userLoginMustBeDomain=true stamps loginNames irreversibly; 35 — E-mail Verificado checkbox OFF by default with no SMTP). NEW v0.7.0 — TWO production-cutover quirks from validade_bateria_estoque PR #9: quirk 36 — backend container that validates JWT needs `extra_hosts: idp.<domain>:host-gateway` when IdP is co-located on a VPS with unreliable hairpin NAT; without it, JWKS reload after the 600s cacheMaxAge TTL fails silently → `JOSEError` → 401-storm starting at ~10min uptime, with JWT `iss`/`aud`/`exp`/`kid` all verifiable by hand (third documented cause of '401-storm with apparently-valid JWT' alongside quirks 12 and 13); quirk 37 — frontend defense-in-depth against 401-storm-revokes-session requires THREE coordinated layers, not just dedupe: L1 dedupe lives in ApiClient with `pendingRenew` instance field + public `refreshToken()` shared between 401-retry and `addAccessTokenExpiring` handler (provider-level useRef alone leaks via the expiring path); L2 TanStack Query `retry` predicate filters ApiError 401 to avoid amplification; L3 `apiclient:unauthorized` listener with `isAuthRoute()` early-return guard + `state: { returnTo }` on signinRedirect to prevent loop in auth-flow routes and preserve user context across re-auth. Bundles a working docker-compose.zitadel.yml, idempotent bootstrap-zitadel.ts and reset-zitadel.sh. Use whenever starting Zitadel integration, debugging 4xx on Zitadel APIs, validating Zitadel JWTs in Node/TypeScript, customizing the hosted Login UI, wiring an SPA via OIDC PKCE, planning a v2.66→v4 upgrade, refactoring callers from API v1 to v2 against v4.15+, hitting the Login UI v2 deploy bug, onboarding TI staff to provision human users via Console (3 silent footguns), debugging time-correlated 401-storms in production self-hosted backends, or hardening an SPA against RT-reuse session revocation.
